panels.description: Total traffic observed by the selected switch, scaled by sampling_rate.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
    sum(bytes * if(sampling_rate = 0, toUInt64(1), sampling_rate)) AS observed_bytes
FROM flows_raw
WHERE $__timeFilter(time_flow_start)
  AND IPv4NumToString(reinterpretAsUInt32(reverse(substring(sampler_address, 13, 4)))) = '${switch}'

panels.title: Observed Traffic Volume

panels.description: Distinct workloads seen as source or destination on the selected switch.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT countDistinct(workload) AS workloads
FROM
(
    SELECT concat(src_k8s_top_owner_namespace, '/', src_k8s_top_owner_kind, '/', src_k8s_top_owner_name) AS workload
    FROM flows_raw
    WHERE $__timeFilter(time_flow_start)
  AND IPv4NumToString(reinterpretAsUInt32(reverse(substring(sampler_address, 13, 4)))) = '${switch}'
      AND src_k8s_top_owner_name != ''

    UNION ALL

    SELECT concat(dst_k8s_top_owner_namespace, '/', dst_k8s_top_owner_kind, '/', dst_k8s_top_owner_name) AS workload
    FROM flows_raw
    WHERE $__timeFilter(time_flow_start)
  AND IPv4NumToString(reinterpretAsUInt32(reverse(substring(sampler_address, 13, 4)))) = '${switch}'
      AND dst_k8s_top_owner_name != ''
)

panels.title: Workload Count Observed by Switch

panels.description: Distinct Pods seen as source or destination on the selected switch.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT countDistinct(pod) AS pods
FROM
(
    SELECT src_k8s_pod_name AS pod
    FROM flows_raw
    WHERE $__timeFilter(time_flow_start)
  AND IPv4NumToString(reinterpretAsUInt32(reverse(substring(sampler_address, 13, 4)))) = '${switch}'
      AND src_k8s_pod_name != ''

    UNION ALL

    SELECT dst_k8s_pod_name AS pod
    FROM flows_raw
    WHERE $__timeFilter(time_flow_start)
  AND IPv4NumToString(reinterpretAsUInt32(reverse(substring(sampler_address, 13, 4)))) = '${switch}'
      AND dst_k8s_pod_name != ''
)

panels.title: Pod Count Observed by Switch

panels.description: Flow samples received from the selected switch in the selected time range.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT count() AS samples
FROM flows_raw
WHERE $__timeFilter(time_flow_start)
  AND IPv4NumToString(reinterpretAsUInt32(reverse(substring(sampler_address, 13, 4)))) = '${switch}'

panels.title: Flow Sample Count

panels.description: Traffic rate observed by the selected switch over time, scaled by sampling_rate.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
    $__timeInterval(time_flow_start) AS time,
    'Observed traffic rate' AS traffic,
    sum(bytes * if(sampling_rate = 0, toUInt64(1), sampling_rate)) / greatest(toFloat64($__interval_ms) / 1000.0, 1.0) AS observed_rate
FROM flows_raw
WHERE $__timeFilter(time_flow_start)
  AND IPv4NumToString(reinterpretAsUInt32(reverse(substring(sampler_address, 13, 4)))) = '${switch}'
GROUP BY time, traffic
ORDER BY time ASC

panels.title: Switch Observed Traffic Rate

panels.description: Outbound traffic rate observed on the selected switch, limited to the top 10 source workloads by total TX bytes in the selected time range.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
    $__timeInterval(f.time_flow_start) AS time,
    concat(f.src_k8s_top_owner_namespace, '/', f.src_k8s_top_owner_kind, '/', f.src_k8s_top_owner_name) AS workload,
    sum(f.bytes * if(f.sampling_rate = 0, toUInt64(1), f.sampling_rate)) / greatest(toFloat64($__interval_ms) / 1000.0, 1.0) AS tx_rate
FROM flows_raw AS f
WHERE $__timeFilter(f.time_flow_start)
  AND IPv4NumToString(reinterpretAsUInt32(reverse(substring(f.sampler_address, 13, 4)))) = '${switch}'
  AND f.src_k8s_top_owner_name != ''
  AND concat(f.src_k8s_top_owner_namespace, '/', f.src_k8s_top_owner_kind, '/', f.src_k8s_top_owner_name) IN
  (
      SELECT concat(src_k8s_top_owner_namespace, '/', src_k8s_top_owner_kind, '/', src_k8s_top_owner_name) AS workload
      FROM flows_raw
      WHERE $__timeFilter(time_flow_start)
        AND IPv4NumToString(reinterpretAsUInt32(reverse(substring(sampler_address, 13, 4)))) = '${switch}'
        AND src_k8s_top_owner_name != ''
      GROUP BY workload
      ORDER BY sum(bytes * if(sampling_rate = 0, toUInt64(1), sampling_rate)) DESC
      LIMIT 10
  )
GROUP BY time, workload
ORDER BY time ASC

panels.title: Source Workload TX Rate

panels.description: Inbound traffic rate observed on the selected switch, limited to the top 10 destination workloads by total RX bytes in the selected time range.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
    $__timeInterval(f.time_flow_start) AS time,
    concat(f.dst_k8s_top_owner_namespace, '/', f.dst_k8s_top_owner_kind, '/', f.dst_k8s_top_owner_name) AS workload,
    sum(f.bytes * if(f.sampling_rate = 0, toUInt64(1), f.sampling_rate)) / greatest(toFloat64($__interval_ms) / 1000.0, 1.0) AS rx_rate
FROM flows_raw AS f
WHERE $__timeFilter(f.time_flow_start)
  AND IPv4NumToString(reinterpretAsUInt32(reverse(substring(f.sampler_address, 13, 4)))) = '${switch}'
  AND f.dst_k8s_top_owner_name != ''
  AND concat(f.dst_k8s_top_owner_namespace, '/', f.dst_k8s_top_owner_kind, '/', f.dst_k8s_top_owner_name) IN
  (
      SELECT concat(dst_k8s_top_owner_namespace, '/', dst_k8s_top_owner_kind, '/', dst_k8s_top_owner_name) AS workload
      FROM flows_raw
      WHERE $__timeFilter(time_flow_start)
        AND IPv4NumToString(reinterpretAsUInt32(reverse(substring(sampler_address, 13, 4)))) = '${switch}'
        AND dst_k8s_top_owner_name != ''
      GROUP BY workload
      ORDER BY sum(bytes * if(sampling_rate = 0, toUInt64(1), sampling_rate)) DESC
      LIMIT 10
  )
GROUP BY time, workload
ORDER BY time ASC

panels.title: Destination Workload RX Rate

panels.description: Outbound traffic rate observed on the selected switch, limited to the top 10 source Pods by total TX bytes in the selected time range.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
    $__timeInterval(f.time_flow_start) AS time,
    concat(f.src_k8s_pod_namespace, '/', f.src_k8s_pod_name) AS pod,
    f.src_k8s_node_name AS node,
    sum(f.bytes * if(f.sampling_rate = 0, toUInt64(1), f.sampling_rate)) / greatest(toFloat64($__interval_ms) / 1000.0, 1.0) AS tx_rate
FROM flows_raw AS f
WHERE $__timeFilter(f.time_flow_start)
  AND IPv4NumToString(reinterpretAsUInt32(reverse(substring(f.sampler_address, 13, 4)))) = '${switch}'
  AND f.src_k8s_pod_name != ''
  AND (f.src_k8s_pod_namespace, f.src_k8s_pod_name, f.src_k8s_node_name) IN
  (
      SELECT src_k8s_pod_namespace, src_k8s_pod_name, src_k8s_node_name
      FROM flows_raw
      WHERE $__timeFilter(time_flow_start)
        AND IPv4NumToString(reinterpretAsUInt32(reverse(substring(sampler_address, 13, 4)))) = '${switch}'
        AND src_k8s_pod_name != ''
      GROUP BY src_k8s_pod_namespace, src_k8s_pod_name, src_k8s_node_name
      ORDER BY sum(bytes * if(sampling_rate = 0, toUInt64(1), sampling_rate)) DESC
      LIMIT 10
  )
GROUP BY time, pod, node
ORDER BY time ASC

panels.title: Source Pod TX Rate

panels.description: Inbound traffic rate observed on the selected switch, limited to the top 10 destination Pods by total RX bytes in the selected time range.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
    $__timeInterval(f.time_flow_start) AS time,
    concat(f.dst_k8s_pod_namespace, '/', f.dst_k8s_pod_name) AS pod,
    f.dst_k8s_node_name AS node,
    sum(f.bytes * if(f.sampling_rate = 0, toUInt64(1), f.sampling_rate)) / greatest(toFloat64($__interval_ms) / 1000.0, 1.0) AS rx_rate
FROM flows_raw AS f
WHERE $__timeFilter(f.time_flow_start)
  AND IPv4NumToString(reinterpretAsUInt32(reverse(substring(f.sampler_address, 13, 4)))) = '${switch}'
  AND f.dst_k8s_pod_name != ''
  AND (f.dst_k8s_pod_namespace, f.dst_k8s_pod_name, f.dst_k8s_node_name) IN
  (
      SELECT dst_k8s_pod_namespace, dst_k8s_pod_name, dst_k8s_node_name
      FROM flows_raw
      WHERE $__timeFilter(time_flow_start)
        AND IPv4NumToString(reinterpretAsUInt32(reverse(substring(sampler_address, 13, 4)))) = '${switch}'
        AND dst_k8s_pod_name != ''
      GROUP BY dst_k8s_pod_namespace, dst_k8s_pod_name, dst_k8s_node_name
      ORDER BY sum(bytes * if(sampling_rate = 0, toUInt64(1), sampling_rate)) DESC
      LIMIT 10
  )
GROUP BY time, pod, node
ORDER BY time ASC

panels.title: Destination Pod RX Rate

panels.description: Traffic rate observed on the selected switch, limited to the top 10 protocols by total bytes in the selected time range.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
    $__timeInterval(f.time_flow_start) AS time,
    multiIf(f.proto = 1, 'ICMP', f.proto = 6, 'TCP', f.proto = 17, 'UDP', f.proto = 58, 'IPv6-ICMP', concat('Protocol ', toString(f.proto))) AS protocol,
    sum(f.bytes * if(f.sampling_rate = 0, toUInt64(1), f.sampling_rate)) / greatest(toFloat64($__interval_ms) / 1000.0, 1.0) AS traffic_rate
FROM flows_raw AS f
WHERE $__timeFilter(f.time_flow_start)
  AND IPv4NumToString(reinterpretAsUInt32(reverse(substring(f.sampler_address, 13, 4)))) = '${switch}'
  AND f.proto IN
  (
      SELECT proto
      FROM flows_raw
      WHERE $__timeFilter(time_flow_start)
        AND IPv4NumToString(reinterpretAsUInt32(reverse(substring(sampler_address, 13, 4)))) = '${switch}'
      GROUP BY proto
      ORDER BY sum(bytes * if(sampling_rate = 0, toUInt64(1), sampling_rate)) DESC
      LIMIT 10
  )
GROUP BY time, protocol
ORDER BY time ASC

panels.title: Protocol Traffic Rate

list.description: ClickHouse datasource used by the sFlow dashboards.
list.label: ClickHouse
list.name: clickhouse

list.definition:
SELECT DISTINCT
    IPv4NumToString(reinterpretAsUInt32(reverse(substring(sampler_address, 13, 4)))) AS switch
FROM flows_raw
WHERE $__timeFilter(time_flow_start)
ORDER BY switch
list.description: Switch sampler_address rendered as IPv4 string.
list.label: Switch
list.name: switch

query.rawSql:
SELECT DISTINCT
    IPv4NumToString(reinterpretAsUInt32(reverse(substring(sampler_address, 13, 4)))) AS switch
FROM flows_raw
WHERE $__timeFilter(time_flow_start)
ORDER BY switch
